ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the policyholder */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the policyholder (male, female) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the policyholder */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the policyholder has */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Smoking status of the policyholder (yes, no) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the policyholder resides */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the policyholder enrolled in the insurance */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the policyholder */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the policyholder */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the policyholder */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium paid by the policyholder */,
  "last_premium_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last premium payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder making the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., medical, dental) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service provided */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code for the claim */,
  "procedure_code" TEXT /* Procedure code for the claim */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "claim_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_type FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type") REFERENCES claim_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the claim type (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim status */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was last reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who last reviewed the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_details" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., health, life) */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Coverage amount of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy coverage */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "copay_amount" REAL /* Copay amount for the policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy is due for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_details_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_details_policy_type FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type") REFERENCES policy_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum coverage limit for the policy type */,
  "premium_rate" REAL /* Premium rate for the policy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical claim record */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was last updated */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the claim */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_claim_type FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type") REFERENCES claim_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., actuary, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., claims, policyholders) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the policyholder */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the policyholder */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the policyholder */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the policyholder */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the policyholder */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the policyholder */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion of the policyholder */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., owns, rents) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions */,
  "prescribed_medications" TEXT /* List of prescribed medications */,
  "family_medical_history" TEXT /* Family medical history */,
  "last_checkup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last medical checkup */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the policyholder */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the policyholder */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the policyholder */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the policyholder */,
  "last_physical_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the last physical exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score assigned to the policyholder */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor who conducted the risk assessment */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* List of risk factors identified during the assessment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for reducing risk */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the assessor (e.g., actuarial science, data analysis) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the assessor */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications held by the assessor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)
